creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bsam
Date: Wed Sep 19 14:29:37 2012
New Revision: 304521
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304521

Log:
  Add trytond_analytic_sale 2.4.1, tryton Application Platform (Analytic
  Sale Module).
  
  PR:		ports/171501
  Submitted by:	matthias@petermann.it

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_analytic_sale/
  head/finance/trytond_analytic_sale/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_analytic_sale/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_analytic_sale/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_analytic_sale/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:27:35 2012	(r304520)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:29:37 2012	(r304521)
@@ -116,6 +116,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trytond_analytic_account
     SUBDIR += trytond_analytic_invoice
     SUBDIR += trytond_analytic_purchase
+    SUBDIR += trytond_analytic_sale
     SUBDIR += trytond_calendar
     SUBDIR += trytond_carrier
     SUBDIR += trytond_carrier_percentage

Added: head/finance/trytond_analytic_sale/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_analytic_sale/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:29:37 2012	(r304521)
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+# Created by: Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_analytic_sale
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.1
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Analytic Sale Module)
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_analytic_account>=2.4.1:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_analytic_account \
+		trytond_analytic_invoice>=2.4.1:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_analytic_invoice \
+		trytond_sale>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_sale
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_analytic_sale/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_analytic_sale/distinfo	Wed Sep 19 14:29:37 2012	(r304521)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_analytic_sale-2.4.1.tar.gz) = 6d5230613ba046af5621f3de287412fa82e374dd23f278801f537c3b5a5c2a12
+SIZE (trytond_analytic_sale-2.4.1.tar.gz) = 19288

Added: head/finance/trytond_analytic_sale/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_analytic_sale/pkg-descr	Wed Sep 19 14:29:37 2012	(r304521)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+This port adds the Analytic Sale Module to the Tryton Application Platform.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/

Added: head/finance/trytond_analytic_sale/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
